title: erodium cicutarium var. chaerophyllum
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. chaerophyllum, also known as the redstem storksbill or Corn Salad, is a variety of the storksbill plant that belongs to the geranium family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium var. chaerophyllum include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems like bronchitis. Erodium cicutarium var. chaerophyllum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional cooking, particularly in salads and as a garnish.
